title: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Tanker Report - October 17, 2023
summary:
Main
• VLCC spot market activity surges as geopolitical tensions spike - The recent surprising sad events in the Middle East once again reminded us how important energy security is. Tanker owners have been through numerous cycles of geopolitical uncertainty and know that during such uncertain periods charterers are willing to pay up to secure tonnage and thus the option to lift oil. In addition, the fact that Chinese charterers returned to the market following a week of holidays, aided demand, leading to a significant increase in spot rates in both the Atlantic as well as the Middle East markets.
